function.message: Processed the next inbox request successfully: OCR/frontmatter migration completed for all four explicitly listed finance records, and the processed inbox item was removed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas, respected explicit inbox file list as authoritative scope, preserved original note bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly requested OCR workflow on four specific finance files. Using finance schema/workflow docs, each of those four files was updated with required frontmatter fields derived from visible content, with original bodies retained. The inbox item was then deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update guidance.
